title: DUEL!
description: A mod that adds a collection of different weapons!
body:
[2.0.0 update!]

Rapiers - a brand new weapon with quick attack speed, but smaller damage, there are the usual: wooden, stone, iron, diamond, netherite Rapiers. but also three special ones! the usual rapiers are crafted similalry to the sword, but diagonally!
Leviathan Axe - a heavier version of the axe, with more damage
Daggers - quick weapons that deal small damage, and deal more when crouching and on ground, and even more when invis!
Light Maces - a new heavy weapon that does massive damage with an extremely slow atk speed
Sabers - quicker swords with lower damage, that are more durable and enchantable, there is also a special Bone narrow Saber!

Enchants:
Dash(allowing to lunge, with a cooldown) and Smoke bomb(which gives you some invis), for the rapiers and daggers respectively.


-there is a new structure! duelists hut! where you can find the duelist villager, and a duelist table, the duelist villager sells rapiers and rapier connected stuff!

await updates with **NEW** weapons soon!


(everything here is made by one person! so dont judge much. please)
